column1: # ADG 2025 (Australian Deprescribing Guideline 2025) → Wave 3 rule mapping
# This CSV is a 20-row themed manifest covering the public ADG 2025
# medication-class deprescribing themes. The full ADG 2025 set is
# ~185 recommendations; the remaining 165 rows are NOT included here
# — they will be filled by the kb-3 Pipeline-2 extraction (Layer 1
# Wave 5 free-alternative path) once Pipeline-2 completes. Until then
# the recommendation_id column carries TODO(layer1-bind) per row.
#   recommendation_summary — short description of the deprescribing
#   evidence_grade         — ADG 2025 evidence grade as published
#                            (or 'TODO' if not in the public summary)
#   wave3_rule_id          — Wave 3 rule_id if shipped or queued
